mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_user (USERNAME, PASSWORD, DISPLAY_NAME, ROLE_CODE, STATUS) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{displayName}, #{roleCode}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID, USERNAME, PASSWORD, DISPLAY_NAME, ROLE_CODE, STATUS, LAST_LOGIN_TIME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME FROM tb_user WHERE USERNAME = #{username}
SELECT USER_ID, USERNAME, PASSWORD, DISPLAY_NAME, ROLE_CODE, STATUS, LAST_LOGIN_TIME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME FROM tb_user ORDER BY USER_ID
